title: fritillaria messanensis var. neglecta
intro: Fritillaria messanensis var. neglecta is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Fritillaria genus, which is a type of flowering plant commonly referred to as a lily. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Fritillaria messanensis var. neglecta include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Fritillaria messanensis var. neglecta is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
